SEARCH
Package com.github.dakusui.symfonion.song

Class Pattern

java.lang.Object
com.github.dakusui.symfonion.song.Pattern
public class Pattern extends Object

A reusable unit which consists of a sequence of part measures.

See Also:
  • PartMeasure

    Modifier and Type
    Method

    static Pattern
    createPattern(com.google.gson.JsonObject jsonObject, Map<String,NoteMap> noteMaps)
    Creates an object of this class from a given jsonObject and noteMap.
    List<PartMeasure>
    partMeasures()
    Returns a list of part measures which this Pattern consists of.

  • Method Details

    • partMeasures

      public List<PartMeasure> partMeasures()

      Returns a list of part measures which this Pattern consists of.

      Returns:
      A list of part measures.

    • createPattern

      public static Pattern createPattern(com.google.gson.JsonObject jsonObject, Map<String,NoteMap> noteMaps) throws SymfonionException, CompatJsonException

      Creates an object of this class from a given jsonObject and noteMap. The jsonObject can be either:

      {
  "body": "{part measure string}",
}

      Or:

      {
  "body": [
    "{stroke 1}",
    "{stroke 2}"
  ],
  "length": "<bodyValue>",
  "gate": "<gateValue>",
  "$otherParameter": "<otherParameterValue>",
}

      <otherParameterValue> can be one of Pattern.Parameters. This method creates Pattern object and a note map (Map<String, NoteMap>) used for it is chosen from the noteMaps passed to this method. If no matching entry is found in noteMaps, an exception will be thrown.

      Parameters:
      jsonObject - A JSON object which contains the definition of a Pattern object.
      noteMaps - note maps available for this pattern.
      Throws:
      SymfonionException
      CompatJsonException
      See Also:
      • NoteMap
      • PartMeasureParameters
      • PartMeasure
